{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/86631197?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/tempcollab", "id": 86631197, "login": "tempcollab", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg2NjMxMTk3", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/tempcollab", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50014", "cvss": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-88", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary

pnpm passes the lockfile-controlled git `resolution.commit` value to `git fetch` without a `--` separator or commit-format validation. For git dependencies fetched through the shallow-fetch path, a malicious lockfile can replace the expected 40-character commit hash with a Git option such as `--upload-pack=<command>`. For SSH and local transports, `--upload-pack` can execute the supplied command. HTTPS transports ignore `--upload-pack`, so the practical attack surface is primarily SSH or local git dependencies.

## Vulnerability Details

The vulnerable path is in `fetching/git-fetcher/src/index.ts`. When a git dependency host is configured for shallow fetching, pnpm calls:

```typescript
await execGit(['fetch', '--depth', '1', 'origin', resolution.commit], { cwd: tempLocation })
```

Because `resolution.commit` is appended before a `--` separator, Git can parse a commit value beginning with `-` as an option. The same file later passes the value to `git checkout` without a separator:

```typescript
await execGit(['checkout', resolution.commit], { cwd: tempLocation })
```

`resolution.commit` comes from the lockfile and is typed as a plain `string`; pnpm does not validate it as a 40-character hexadecimal commit before passing it to Git.

## Proof of Concept

```bash
bash autofyn_audit/exploits/vuln11_git_upload_pack_rce/exploit.sh
# Creates a local bare git repo and triggers the shallow-fetch path.
# Replaces the lockfile commit hash with '--upload-pack=touch /tmp/vuln11_pwned'.
# Result: PASS -- /tmp/vuln11_pwned created by injected touch command.
```

The PoC uses a local `file://githost/...` repository because the injection requires a local or SSH transport. HTTPS transport ignores `--upload-pack`.

## Impact

Code execution as the user running `pnpm install`, under specific transport conditions. The attacker must modify `pnpm-lock.yaml`, and the affected dependency must use SSH or local git transport. HTTPS transport (the common case) is immune.

## Suggested Remediation

Add a `--` separator before lockfile-controlled git revision values. Validate `resolution.commit` matches `/^[0-9a-f]{40}$/i` before passing to Git.

---

> Discovered by [AutoFyn](https://github.com/SignalPilot-Labs/AutoFyn)
> Full audit report: [audit_report.md](https://github.com/tempcollab/pnpm/blob/main/autofyn_audit/audit_report.md)
> Exploit script: [exploit.sh](https://github.com/tempcollab/pnpm/blob/main/autofyn_audit/exploits/vuln11_git_upload_pack_rce/exploit.sh)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0018, "percentile": 0.07681}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T22:53:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50014"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-25T18:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-06-26T22:53:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm/security/advisories/GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50014", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/pnpm/pnpm/security-advisories/GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/pnpm/pnpm", "summary": "pnpm: Git Fetch Argument Injection via Lockfile resolution.commit", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T22:53:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p4xf-rf54-rj3x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.34.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 10.34.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "11.4.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "pnpm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.0, < 11.4.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pnpm: Git Fetch Argument Injection via Lockfile resolution.commit
